description_long: This is a large educational complex featuring multiple interconnected buildings with angular, light-colored roofs and a variety of geometric forms. The main structures are arranged around a central courtyard, with a prominent entrance area and several wings extending outward. Adjacent to the buildings is a large, oval-shaped running track and sports field, as well as a separate gymnasium or auditorium structure. The grounds include paved walkways, landscaped areas with trees, and open spaces for recreation. The site is surrounded by additional facilities such as parking lots and what appears to be a baseball or softball field. The overall layout is typical of a suburban or urban school campus, designed to accommodate a significant number of students and staff.
description: A sprawling school campus with multiple angular-roofed buildings, a large sports field, and landscaped grounds. The site includes a running track, gymnasium, and various outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, central courtyard, and the arrangement of the primary school buildings, with the running track and sports field visible to the left.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gymnasium or auditorium structure in the foreground and provides a clear look at the running track and adjacent open areas.
description_view_2: From the rear, the interconnected buildings and their angular roofs are prominent, with the sports field and track on the right and additional facilities in the background.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the running track and sports field, with the school buildings and gymnasium visible in the background, and open grounds in the foreground.
